SEARCH
Package com.example.restapi.service

Class SaleService

java.lang.Object
com.example.restapi.service.SaleService
@Service public class SaleService extends Object
Service layer for recording and querying sales. Converts checked-out cart lines into Sale records and provides seller-centric sales reports.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SaleService(SaleRepository saleRepository)
    Constructs SaleService.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<SaleResponse>
    getSalesBySellerId(UUID sellerId)
    Returns all sales made by a particular seller.
    Double
    getTotalSalesBySellerId(UUID sellerId)
    Calculates the total revenue for a seller.
    void
    recordSalesFromCheckout(Receipt receipt, Cart cart)
    Persists a Sale line for each item in the cart.

  • Constructor Details

    • SaleService

      public SaleService(SaleRepository saleRepository)
      Constructs SaleService.
      Parameters:
      saleRepository - Data-access object for Sale entities.

  • Method Details

    • recordSalesFromCheckout

      @Transactional public void recordSalesFromCheckout(Receipt receipt, Cart cart)
      Persists a Sale line for each item in the cart. Extracts the seller from every CartItem and links it to the receipt.
      Parameters:
      receipt - The receipt produced during checkout.
      cart - The cart that was purchased.

    • getSalesBySellerId

      public List<SaleResponse> getSalesBySellerId(UUID sellerId)
      Returns all sales made by a particular seller.
      Parameters:
      sellerId - UUID of the seller.
      Returns:
      List of SaleResponse DTOs.

    • getTotalSalesBySellerId

      public Double getTotalSalesBySellerId(UUID sellerId)
      Calculates the total revenue for a seller.
      Parameters:
      sellerId - UUID of the seller.
      Returns:
      Sum of all sale totals for that seller.
